verses.geez:
ወልህቀ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኀለፈ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ኀለፈ ፡ መዋዕሊከ ፡ ለከ ፡
                  ወተርፈት ፡ ምድር ፡ ብዝኅት ፡ ዘይትወረሱ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua was old and very advanced in years; and the Lord said to Joshua, Thou art advanced in years, and there is much land left to inherit.
translations.kjv: Now Joshua was old and stricken in years; and the LORD said unto him, Thou art old and stricken in years, and there remaineth yet very much land to be possessed.

verses.geez: ወዛቲ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ተርፈት ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለፍል[ስጥኤ]ም ፡ ወዘጌሲሪ ፡ ወዘከናኔዎን ፤

translations.lxx: And this is the land that is left: the borders of the Phylistines, the Gesirite, and the Chananite,
translations.kjv: This is the land that yet remaineth: all the borders of the Philistines, and all Geshuri,

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ በድው ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እስከ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለአቃሮን ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ፀጋሞሙ ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡
                  ዘይትኌለቍ ፡ ለኀምስቱ ፡ በሓውርተ ፡ ፊልስጢእም ፡ ለጋዛ ፡ ወለአዛጦን ፡ ወለአስቀሎን ፡ ወለጌቴዎን ፡ ወለአቃሮን ፡
                  ወለኤዌዎን ።

translations.lxx: from the wilderness before Egypt, as far as the borders of Accaron on the left of the Chananites the land is reckoned to the five principalities of the Phylistines, to the inhabitant of Gaza, and of Azotus, and of Ascalon, and of Geth, and of Accaron, and to the Evite;
translations.kjv: From Sihor, which is before Egypt, even unto the borders of Ekron northward, which is counted to the Canaanite: five lords of the Philistines; the Gazathites, and the Ashdothites, the Eshkalonites, the Gittites, and the Ekronites; also the Avites:

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ ቴመን ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ዘቅድመ ፡ ጋዛ ፡ ወሲዶናሂ ፡ እስከ ፡ ጣፌቅ ፡ እስከ ፡ አድዋሊሆሙ ፡
                  ለአሞሬዎን ።

translations.lxx: from Thæman even to all the land of Chanaan before Gaza, and the Sidonians as far as Aphec, as far as the borders of the Amorites.
translations.kjv: From the south, all the land of the Canaanites, and Mearah that is beside the Sidonians unto Aphek, to the borders of the Amorites:

verses.geez:
ወኵሎ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ገልየድ ፡ ዘፊልስጢእም ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሊባኖን ፡ እምነ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ገልጋላ ፡ ዘመትሕተ
                  ፡ ደብረ ፡ አኤርሞን ፡ እስከ ፡ ምብዋኦ ፡ ለኤመት ።

translations.lxx: And all the land of Galiath of the Phylistines, and all Libanus eastward from Galgal, under the mountain Aermon as far as the entering in of Emath;
translations.kjv: And the land of the Giblites, and all Lebanon, toward the sunrising, from Baalgad under mount Hermon unto the entering into Hamath.

verses.geez:
ኵሎ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድባር ፡ እምነ ፡ ሊባኖስ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሙዓለ ፡ ሴሬት ፡ ዘማይም ፡ ዘፎሜም ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ሲዶና ፡ እለ ፡ አነ ፡ ኣጠፍኦሙ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ በከመ ፡ እቤ ፡ ለከ ።

translations.lxx: every one that inhabits the hill country from Libanus as far as Masereth Memphomaim. All the Sidonians, I will destroy them from before Israel; but do thou give them by inheritance to Israel, as I charged thee.
translations.kjv: All the inhabitants of the hill country from Lebanon unto Misrephothmaim, and all the Sidonians, them will I drive out from before the children of Israel: only divide thou it by lot unto the Israelites for an inheritance, as I have commanded thee.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ክፍሎሙ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወአስተዋርሶሙ ፡ ለትስዐቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወለመንፈቀ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘመናሴ ።

translations.lxx: And now divide this land by lot to the nine tribes, and to the half tribe of Manasse.
translations.kjv: Now therefore divide this land for an inheritance unto the nine tribes, and the half tribe of Manasseh,

verses.geez:
እምነ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ እስከ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ዐረበ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ይሁቦሙ ፡ ወትከውኖሙ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ፡ ባሐር
                  ፡ ዐቢይ ።

translations.lxx: From Jordan to the great sea westward thou shalt give it them: the great sea shall be the boundary. But to the two tribes and to the half tribe of Manasse, to Ruben and to Gad Moses gave an inheritance beyond Jordan: Moses the servant of the Lord gave it to them eastward,
translations.kjv: With whom the Reubenites and the Gadites have received their inheritance, which Moses gave them, beyond Jordan eastward, even as Moses the servant of the LORD gave them;

verses.geez:
ለእልክቱ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ነገድ ፡ ለሮቤል ፡ ወለጋድ ፡ ወለመንፈቀ ፡ ነገደ ፡ መናሴ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡
                  ዮርዳንስ ፤

translations.lxx: from Aroer, which is on the bank of the brook of Arnon, and the city in the midst of the valley, and all Misor from Mædaban.
translations.kjv: From Aroer, that is upon the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that is in the midst of the river, and all the plain of Medeba unto Dibon;

verses.geez:
ዘመንገለ ፡ ሠረቀ ፡ ፀሐይ ፡ ወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እምነ ፡ አሮኤር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ
                  ፡ ፈለገ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ወሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ቈላት ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሚሶር ፡ እምነ ፡ [ሜ]ዳቦን ።

translations.lxx: All the cities of Seon king of the Amorites, who reigned from Esebon to the coasts of the children of Ammon;
translations.kjv: And all the cities of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, unto the border of the children of Ammon;

verses.geez: ኵሉ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ዘነግሠ ፡ በሔሴቦን ፡ እስከ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዐሞን ፤

translations.lxx: and the region of Galaad, and the borders of the Gesirites and the Machatites, the whole mount of Aermon, and all the land of Basan to Acha.
translations.kjv: And Gilead, and the border of the Geshurites and Maachathites, and all mount Hermon, and all Bashan unto Salcah;

verses.geez: ወለገላአድ ፡ ወለደወሎሙ ፡ ለጌሲሪ ፡ ወለማኬጢ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ አድባረ ፡ አኤርሞን ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ባሳን ፡ እስከ ፡ አካ ።

translations.lxx: All the kingdom of Og in the region of Basan, who reigned in Astaroth and in Edrain: he was left of the giants; and Moses smote him, and destroyed him.
translations.kjv: All the kingdom of Og in Bashan, which reigned in Ashtaroth and in Edrei, who remained of the remnant of the giants: for these did Moses smite, and cast them out.

verses.geez:
ኵሎ ፡ መንግሥቶ ፡ ለአግ ፡ ዘባሳን ፡ ዘነግሠ ፡ በኤድራይን ፡ ወበአስጣሮት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ እምነ ፡ ደሞሙ ፡
                  ለእለ ፡ ያርብሕ ፡ ወቀተሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ [ወአጥፍኦ ፡] ፡ ወ[ኢያ]ጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለጌሲሪ ፡ ወለመካጢ ፡
                  ወለከናኔዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ውስቴቶሙ ፡ [ወ]ይነብር ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ጌሲሪ ፡ ወመካጢ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡
                  ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: But the children of Israel destroyed not the Gesirite and the Machatite and the Chananite; and the king of the Gesiri and the Machatite dwelt among the children of Israel until this day.
translations.kjv: Nevertheless the children of Israel expelled not the Geshurites, nor the Maachathites: but the Geshurites and the Maachathites dwell among the Israelites until this day.

verses.geez:
እንበለ ፡ ነገደ ፡ ሌዊ ፡ እለ ፡ ኢነሥኡ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  መክፈልቶሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወከማሁ ፡ ተከፈሉ ፡ በከመ ፡ ከፈሎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  በ[አራቦ]ት ፡ ዘሞአብ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: Only no inheritance was given to the tribe of Levi: the Lord God of Israel, he is their inheritance, as the Lord said to them; and this is the division which Moses made to the children of Israel in Araboth Moab, on the other side of Jordan, by Jericho.
translations.kjv: Only unto the tribe of Levi he gave none inheritance; the sacrifices of the LORD God of Israel made by fire are their inheritance, as he said unto them.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለነገደ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses gave the land to the tribe of Ruben according to their families.
translations.kjv: And Moses gave unto the tribe of the children of Reuben inheritance according to their families.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሮኤር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ወሀገሮሂ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ አርኖን ፡
                  ወኵሉ ፡ ሚሶር ፡ እስከ ፡ ሔሴቦን ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were from Aroer, which is opposite the brook of Arnon, and theirs is the city that is in the valley of Arnon; and all Misor,
translations.kjv: And their coast was from Aroer, that is on the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that is in the midst of the river, and all the plain by Medeba;

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ አህጉር ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሚሶር ፡ ወዴቦን ፡ ወበሞን ፡ ወበዓል ፡ ወአብያት ፡ ሜዔልሞት ።

translations.lxx: to Esebon, and all the cities in Misor, and Dæbon, and Bæmon-Baal, and the house of Meelboth;
translations.kjv: Heshbon, and all her cities that are in the plain; Dibon, and Bamothbaal, and Bethbaalmeon,

verses.geez: ወባሳን ፡ ወበቄድሞን ፡ ወሜፋት ።

translations.lxx: and Basan, and Bakedmoth, and Mæphaad,
translations.kjv: And Jahaza, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,

verses.geez: ወቃርያትም ፡ ወሴባማ ፡ ወሴራዶት ፡ ወሲዮን ፡ በደብረ ፡ ኤነብ ።

translations.lxx: and Kariathaim, and Sebama, and Serada, and Sion in mount Enab;
translations.kjv: And Kirjathaim, and Sibmah, and Zarethshahar in the mount of the valley,

verses.geez: ወቤተ ፡ ፌጎር ፡ ወኤሴዶት ፡ (ወ)ፈስጋ ፡ ወኤቤታነሲኖት ።

translations.lxx: and Bæthphogor, and Asedoth Phasga, and Bætthasinoth,
translations.kjv: And Bethpeor, and Ashdothpisgah, and Bethjeshimoth,

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ሚሶር ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ መግሥተ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ዘቀተለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወመሳፍንተ ፡ [ምድያም
                  ፡] ወኤዊን ፡ ወሮቦ[ቅ] ፡ ወሱር ፡ ወኡር ፡ ወሮቤ ፡ መሳፍንተ ፡ ጰራሊያ ፡ ወእለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሲዮን ።

translations.lxx: and all the cities of Misor, and all the kingdom of Seon king of the Amorites, whom Moses smote, even him and the princes of Madian, and Evi, and Roboc, and Sur, and Ur, and Robe prince of the spoils of Sion, and the inhabitants of Sion.
translations.kjv: And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses smote with the princes of Midian, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, which were dukes of Sihon, dwelling in the country.

verses.geez: ወበላዓም ፡ ወልደ ፡ ቤዖር ፡ ዘመቅሰም ፡ ቀተልዎሙ ፡ በምዕር ።

translations.lxx: And Balaam the son of Bæor the prophet they slew in the battle.
translations.kjv: Balaam also the son of Beor, the soothsayer, did the children of Israel slay with the sword among them that were slain by them.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለሮቤል ፡ (ወ)ዮርዳንስ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ፡ ወዝንቱ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ሮቤል ፡ በቦ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡
                  ወአህጉሪሆሙኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the borders of Ruben were—even Jordan was the boundary; this is the inheritance of the children of Ruben according to their families, these were their cities and their villages.
translations.kjv: And the border of the children of Reuben was Jordan, and the border thereof. This was the inheritance of the children of Reuben after their families, the cities and the villages thereof.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጋድ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses gave inheritance to the sons of Gad according to their families.
translations.kjv: And Moses gave inheritance unto the tribe of Gad, even unto the children of Gad according to their families.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ኢያዜር ፡ [ወ]ኵሉ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ወመንፈቀ ፡ [ምድረ ፡] ደቂቀ ፡ ዐሞን ፡ እስከ ፡ ዐራባ
                  ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ገጸ ፡ አራድ ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were Jazer, all the cities of Galaad, and half the land of the children of Ammon to Araba, which is before Arad.
translations.kjv: And their coast was Jazer, and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the children of Ammon, unto Aroer that is before Rabbah;

verses.geez:
ወእምነ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ እስከ ፡ [አ]ራቦት ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ መሴፋ ፡ ወቦጣኒ ፡ ወማዐን ፡ እስከ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ለዴቦን
                  ።

translations.lxx: And from Esebon to Araboth by Massepha, and Botanim, and Maan to the borders of Dæbon,
translations.kjv: And from Heshbon unto Ramathmizpeh, and Betonim; and from Mahanaim unto the border of Debir;

verses.geez:
ወበአዶም ፡ ወዖትርጋ ፡ ወዐበይን ፡ ዘትነብራ ፡ ወሴኮታ ፡ ወሳፈን ፡ ወባዕድኒ ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ መንግሥቱ ፡ ለሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ
                  ፡ ሔሴቦን ፤ ወዮርዳንስ ፡ ወሰኖሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ሕብር ፡ ዘባሕረ ፡ ኬኔሬት ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ ጽባሓዊ ።

translations.lxx: and Enadom, and Othargai, and Bænthanabra, and Soccotha, and Saphan, and the rest of the kingdom of Seon king of Esebon: and Jordan shall be the boundary as far as part of the sea of Chenereth beyond Jordan eastward.
translations.kjv: And in the valley, Betharam, and Bethnimrah, and Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, Jordan and his border, even unto the edge of the sea of Chinnereth on the other side Jordan eastward.

verses.geez:
ወዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መክፈልቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ጋድ ፡ በበ ፡ ነገዶሙ ፤ ወሜጡ ፡ ዘባኖሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀሮሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ በበ
                  ፡ ነገዶሙ ፡ ኮነ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙኒ ፡ ወደብረ ፡ አህጉሪሆሙኒ ።

translations.lxx: This is the inheritance of the children of Gad according to their families and according to their cities: according to their families they will turn their backs before their enemies, because their cities and their villages were according to their families.
translations.kjv: This is the inheritance of the children of Gad after their families, the cities, and their villages.

verses.geez: ወወሀቦሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለመንፈቀ ፡ ነገደ ፡ መናሴ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses gave to half the tribe of Manasse according to their families.
translations.kjv: And Moses gave inheritance unto the half tribe of Manasseh: and this was the possession of the half tribe of the children of Manasseh by their families.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ መሐና ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ መንግሥተ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ መንግሥተ ፡ አግ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወኵሉ
                  ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ኢያኢር ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዋ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ስሳ ፡ አህጉር ።

translations.lxx: And their borders were from Maan, and all the kingdom of Basan, and all the kingdom of Og king of Basan, and all the villages of Jair, which are in the region of Basan, sixty cities:
translations.kjv: And their coast was from Mahanaim, all Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, threescore cities:

verses.geez:
ወመንፈቀ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ገላአድ ፡ ወበአስጣሮት ፡ ወበኤ(ን)ድራይን ፡ አህጉረ ፡ መንግሥቱ ፡ ለአግ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ባሳን
                  ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ማኪር ፡ ትውልደ ፡ መናሴ ፡ ወለመንፈቆሙሂ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ማኪር ፡ ዘትውልደ ፡ መናሴ ፡ በበ ፡ ሕዘቢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and the half of Galaad, and in Astaroth, and in Edrain, royal cities of Og in the land of Basan, Moses gave to the sons of Machir the sons of Manasse, even to the half-tribe sons of Machir the sons of Manasse, according to their families.
translations.kjv: And half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, were pertaining unto the children of Machir the son of Manasseh, even to the one half of the children of Machir by their families.

verses.geez:
[*እሉ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እለ ፡*] አስተዋረሶሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ በአራቦት ፡ ዘሞአብ ፡ በማዕዶተ ፡
                  ዮርዳንስ ፡ ዘመንገለ ፡ ጽባሒሁ ፡ ለኢያሪኮ ።

translations.lxx: These are they whom Moses caused to inherit beyond Jordan in Araboth Moab, beyond Jordan by Jericho eastward.
translations.kjv: These are the countries which Moses did distribute for inheritance in the plains of Moab, on the other side Jordan, by Jericho, eastward.
